title: Feature Root: TUI Layout Restructure and Panel Maximize
description: Non-runnable execution root coordinating the TUI layout refactor, panel maximize behavior, focus-cycle updates, validation, docs, and review for the single-file TUI change.
acceptance_criteria: Scheduler log is rendered as a third peer panel beside bead list and detail.
Status bar is a single borderless line pinned to the bottom.
Focused panel can be maximized/restored with `m` while status bar remains visible.
Tab and Shift+Tab cycle focus across list, detail, and scheduler log.
Existing TUI behaviors continue to work after the layout refactor.
